worktrees-parallel-execution.intent: Add git worktree support so parallel partitions run in isolated filesystem directories, enabling true parallel agent execution driven by a dependency DAG in approach.md

feat/worktree-utils.intent: Shared worktree utilities in utils.py: create_worktree, remove_worktree, parse_partitions_dag, WorktreeDirtyError

feat/worktree-templates.intent: Update approach.md template and emergence instructions for partitions DAG; add context.md to .gitignore
